channel.title: github on Delnegend's Cave
channel.description: Recent content in github on Delnegend's Cave

item.title: Setup SSH Key for Git services on Windows
item.description: Installing Git Git-scm.com Generating SSH key Open Terminal, type these and just hit Enter 1 ssh-keygen -t ed25519 It will generate a public key (id_ed25519.pub) and a private key (id_ed25519) in your home directory (C:\Users\username.ssh). Change the file name however you want. Create config file Navigate to %userprofile%\.ssh, create a file named config and paste this (change accordingly, explanation below) Host github.com HostName github.com IdentityFile ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 IdentitiesOnly yes Line 1: how Git identifies which host to use.
